canvas_bubble_bug.symptom: Ethica streams code into chat bubble BEFORE _handle_canvas_push intercepts it. Code appears in both chat and canvas.
canvas_bubble_bug.root_cause: buffer_token() streams all tokens into chat bubble in real time. _handle_canvas_push() only runs after full response assembled. By then bubble already has all content.
canvas_bubble_bug.what_was_tried: Added _canvas_sentinels suppression in _on_response. Suppresses the trailing confirmation line only — does not clear already-streamed code from bubble.
canvas_bubble_bug.full_fix_design: Token-level suppression during streaming. In buffer_token() in _on_send: detect [CANVAS:, [DEBUG:, or opening ``` fence. Enter suppression mode — stop appending tokens to bubble. Collect suppressed tokens in a separate buffer. On closing marker or response complete, push collected content to canvas. Chat shows only Ethica's intent text before the marker.

module_registry_impl_loading.note: Registry skips __init__.py. _find_impl() picks first .py matching folder name.
module_registry_impl_loading.fix: Add 'entry' field to manifest.json to explicitly declare bridge file.

live_traffic_monitor.note: traffic_start requires CAP_NET_RAW — deferred to M5.

guard_seal_module_dirs.note: MODULE_DIRS is hardcoded. Every new module must be added here.

next_session_priorities: 1. CANVAS STREAMING BUBBLE FIX — Token-level suppression in buffer_token(). When [CANVAS:], [DEBUG:], or fenced code block detected, suppress tokens from bubble, collect them, push to canvas on completion. Chat shows intent only. Canvas shows content. See canvas_bubble_bug block for full design.

2. ETHICA TWO-WAY AWARENESS — Four parts: dashboard→Ethica context feed, canvas→Ethica tab audit, Ethica→agents inject confirmation, Ethica→agents stop signal (stop_signal field in status JSONs + poll loop + stop trigger phrases).
